arguments.new_string:
import (
	"database/sql"
	"errors"
	"fmt"

	"github.com/golang-migrate/migrate/v4"
	"github.com/golang-migrate/migrate/v4/database"
	clickhouseMigrate "github.com/golang-migrate/migrate/v4/database/clickhouse"
	postgresMigrate "github.com/golang-migrate/migrate/v4/database/postgres"
	"github.com/golang-migrate/migrate/v4/source/iofs"
	"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/config"
	"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/migrations"
	"go.uber.org/zap"
)

//nolint:unparam
func (a *AnalyticsConfig) setDefaults(v *viper.Viper) error {
	v.SetDefault("analytics.storage.clickhouse.enabled", "false")
	v.SetDefault("analytics.storage.clickhouse.url", "")
	v.SetDefault("analytics.storage.cockroachdb.enabled", "false")
	v.SetDefault("analytics.storage.cockroachdb.url", "")
	v.SetDefault("analytics.storage.prometheus.enabled", "false")
	v.SetDefault("analytics.storage.prometheus.url", "")
	v.SetDefault("analytics.buffer.flush_period", "10s")
	return nil
}

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_flipt_counter_aggregated_analytics_v2_env_ns_flag ON flipt_counter_aggregated_analytics_v2 (environment_key, namespace_key, flag_key);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_flipt_counter_aggregated_analytics_v2_timestamp ON flipt_counter_aggregated_analytics_v2 (timestamp);
